mapper.select: SELECT id, enabled, base_url, api_key_cipher, model, timeout_ms, max_retries, updated_by, updated_at FROM ai_llm_config WHERE id = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_llm_config (id, enabled, base_url, api_key_cipher, model, timeout_ms, max_retries, updated_by) VALUES (1, #{enabled}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKeyCipher}, #{model}, #{timeoutMs}, #{maxRetries}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enabled = VALUES(enabled), base_url = VALUES(base_url), api_key_cipher = VALUES(api_key_cipher), model = VALUES(model), timeout_ms = VALUES(timeout_ms), max_retries = VALUES(max_retries), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
